It was a bright afternoon, and the little park by the library was busier than usual. Children moved between the benches, several dogs darted across the grass, and a person played quiet music from a speaker beside the fountain.

As the sun began to lower, the crowd thinned somewhat. A pair of friends sat on the stone wall eating fries, two teenagers tried skateboard tricks near the path, and the music at the fountain gave way to the sound of water and faint traffic nearby.
